name: Halloween Meatloaf Mice
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix together the ingredients for the mice bodies and shape into 4 small, mouse-shaped loaves on a baking sheet. Shape them to a point in the front and rounded in the back.
Bake for 45 minutes in the preheated oven or until desired doneness.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly. Make tiny slits for the ears about 1/3 from the pointed end, place carrot coins (cut into small coins) in the slits for the ears.
Make a tiny slit in the rounded wide end for the tail, place a thin carrot strip in the slit for the tail.
Use raisins for the eyes. Arrange spaghetti sauce on a plate and place meatloaf mice on top to serve.
